issues: No UCI 1.1 or above races found on March 31, 2026. This is a confirmed rest/transfer day between In Flanders Fields (Sunday 29 March) and Dwars door Vlaanderen (Wednesday 1 April). Both the men's and women's WorldTour calendars are empty today. The G.P. Emilia 1.1 (Italy) was originally scheduled around this period but was cancelled for 2026. The next races are Dwars door Vlaanderen men and women on April 1.

recent_results.race: In Flanders Fields – From Middelkerke to Wevelgem (Men)
recent_results.notes: Van der Poel and Van Aert escaped with 36km to go but were reeled in at 1km by a counter-attack; Philipsen timed his sprint perfectly in the bunch finish. Mads Pedersen was DNS (illness).
Wiebes wins her third consecutive edition (record) in a sprint of five after the Kemmelberg made the final selection.

recent_results.race: Settimana Internazionale Coppi e Bartali – Stage 5 (Final)
recent_results.winner: TBC — Axel Laurance (INEOS Grenadiers) led overall entering final stage

upcoming.notes: Final dress rehearsal before Tour of Flanders. Van Aert, Pedersen (recovered from illness), Philipsen, Ganna headline.
Lotte Kopecky, Marianne Vos, Lorena Wiebes, Elisa Longo Borghini among top contenders.
